description: Short Claude OS recipes: copy-paste command sequences with expectations and failure follow-ups.

recipes.name: Validate local (quick)
recipes.summary: Fast local validation gate before sharing a branch or opening a PR.

recipes.name: Validate release (strict)
recipes.summary: Release-style validation including strict skills, playbooks, and aggregate health.

recipes.name: Initialize a new project
recipes.summary: Scaffold .claude and adapters from this repo with dry-run first.

recipes.name: Add a new skill
recipes.summary: Manifest, canonical SKILL.md, sync, and validation checklist for a new skill.

recipes.name: Sync skills to adapters
recipes.summary: Regenerate .claude and .cursor skill copies from canonical source.

recipes.name: Repair adapter drift
recipes.summary: Skills and multi-tool adapter drift repair using manifest-driven sync.

recipes.name: Prepare a release
recipes.summary: Commands and gates before tagging; pair with playbooks/release.md.
